languages.text: Под вашим влиянием магос Экзальт-117 произвел своевременное обслуживание зенитных турелей.
Under your influence, Magos Exalt-117 performed timely maintenance on the air defence turrets.
languages.original_text: Под вашим влиянием магос Экзальт-117 произвел своевременное обслуживание зенитных турелей.

traits.locale_text: Under your influence, Magos Exalt-117 performed timely maintenance on the air defence turrets.

languages.text: Bajo tu influencia, el magos Exaltado-117 aplicó un mantenimiento adecuado de las torretas de defensa aérea.
languages.original_text: Under your influence, Magos Exalt-117 performed timely maintenance on the air defence turrets.

traits.locale_text: Bajo tu influencia, el magos Exaltado-117 aplicó un mantenimiento adecuado de las torretas de defensa aérea.

languages.text: 在你的影响下，贤者尊使-117及时对防空炮台进行了维护。
languages.original_text: Under your influence, Magos Exalt-117 performed timely maintenance on the air defence turrets.

traits.locale_text: 在你的影响下，贤者尊使-117及时对防空炮台进行了维护。

languages.text: Vous avez fait en sorte que le magos Exalt-117 accomplisse une maintenance opportune sur les tourelles de défense aériennes.
languages.original_text: Under your influence, Magos Exalt-117 performed timely maintenance on the air defence turrets.

traits.locale_text: Vous avez fait en sorte que le magos Exalt-117 accomplisse une maintenance opportune sur les tourelles de défense aériennes.

languages.text: Magos Exalt-117, senin etkinle hava savunma taretlerinin bakımını zamanında gerçekleştirdi.
languages.original_text: Under your influence, Magos Exalt-117 performed timely maintenance on the air defence turrets.

traits.locale_text: Magos Exalt-117, senin etkinle hava savunma taretlerinin bakımını zamanında gerçekleştirdi.

languages.text: Unter deinem Einfluss hat Magos Exalt-117 die Flugabwehrgeschütze rechtzeitig gewartet.
languages.original_text: Under your influence, Magos Exalt-117 performed timely maintenance on the air defence turrets.

traits.locale_text: Unter deinem Einfluss hat Magos Exalt-117 die Flugabwehrgeschütze rechtzeitig gewartet.

languages.text: あなたの影響で、マゴス・エクサルト117は、防空砲塔の定期的なメンテナンスを適切に行いました。
languages.original_text: Under your influence, Magos Exalt-117 performed timely maintenance on the air defence turrets.

traits.locale_text: あなたの影響で、マゴス・エクサルト117は、防空砲塔の定期的なメンテナンスを適切に行いました。
